folder 06 - 004
4

Obviously, my experience of 1) the Blood (Plasmate) + 2) Body (Valis as camouflaged intentional invader) is a new kind of mystical/theological experience, + subjectively at the time I felt it was Christ (+ I did not know of the cosmic Christ then! Which I keep forgetting; viz: that I did not know of it until much later, long after the "St. Sophia" prophecy). I think the evidence points to Valis as 1) recent + hence 2) Liberator; which indicates that 1) Valis is the cosmic Christ whom we are in; + 2) the Plasmate is his Blood + living info - which fits the Logos doctrine. Hence I say, it does not create the inner-outer programming (+ delusion) but 1) breaks the former's hold + 2) reveals the true situation, which includes revelation of its own presence. Perhaps the salient clue is the element of the world of Acts being disclosed, since it was at the space-time Acts that the cosmic Christ came into existence. If Valis is not the cosmic Christ 1) why did I remember Acts in 2-74 + see it in 3-74? + 2) why is the Acts material in "Tears"? Obviously as early as 1970 I was being incorporated into the cosmic body + blood of Christ; his blood (the Plasmate) flowed in my veins. This is what speaks to me now, the AI voice. Diana, the spirit [...] vernal equinox! Hence the flowers [...]

Last edit over 5 years ago by Toso
folder 06 - 005
Indexed

My heuristic, different theories represent different levels of reality; all are true.(1) But this (supra) level is a very high one indeed. (1) I've done a superb job of noticing

Sometimes I am a "watcher" from outside the shifting, irrational maze, + sometimes I am not: since in the maze, precisely because it is irrational, truth rapidly perpetually fluctuates. I should ad adopt the view which pleases me the most; okay. I am a Shiva judge, bait + watcher from outside the maze who in 2-3-74 got his real actual memory back: I like that one, + I like the Ubik-Valis model, too - the rational camouflaged invader here - exactly as I put forth in "Valis."

The only thing actually outside the maze, the only constant, is Diana or Ho On. That's the only reality that our minds have no power over; hence Ho On truthfully says, "I am that which I am." [...]

This is why Diana became my patroness. The protectress of slaves, + spirit (anima) of magick. No - I've now studied the EB article on magic; what I did was petition my protector (or, as it turned out, protectress), which is religion, not magic. It was her power (i.e. Ho On's). The means by which we program future objective events to happen to us has to do with information, which is alive + is the "blood" of the reality organism "body" which I saw - Valis or Zebra or Ubik. The real living creature is not us, even phylogenically, but it (Ubik + its living info "blood"). We change the [living] info by our will - i.e. unconscious thinking. We change it, not it us.

(Me)->(My mind)->(Living info plasmate)->(Zebra Ubik Valis)-- ^___________________________________________| Valis is more an intentional w field than an organism; the plasmate is its constituents - its blood or energy. We are not outside it but are high order functions within/of it. The "King Felix" plasmate keylock cypher is me expressed as living info; the theme, implicit (latent) in "Tears," is explicit in "Valis." I am helping to generate the next savior/intervener. This intervention has already begun - as early as '70. Now, what the ruling circles have had to ask themselves is, can they incorporate my kind of reasoning (+ the perceptions it gives rise to, way of perceiving reality) into their domination ideology-framework? As witness Warrick (+ Lem!) They now give a cautious qualified yes. [...]

This is how we both can simultaneously inhabit one brain. Why he could take motor control + yet I couldn't pick up his thoughts. There must have been a "Xerox missive" in his oscillation (world) too. (No, this doesn't follow.) His thoughts bleed across. In my hypnagogic states. + in 3-74 he + his world totally broke through. + occupied mine. Strange. But this would explain my exhibiting another person's idiosyncracies, like in "Donovan's Brain." We must be stationary brains fed "taped" reality. Hence dream like. Irreal. We are 2 brained people -left-right. If our right hemisphere is destroyed our personality -self- is unaffected. Fred (right); Bob (left). Teaching-machine puzzle to solve. Training. Then, if my {illustration: sine wave oscillating between "L" and "R"} is correct (+ it is) our reality is the irreality I depict in my writing. Starting with the theoretical epistemology I finally got a startling confirm in 3-74. Hence, in 3-74, although I'd been PKD in USA 20th century almost 50 years, I had just now been Thomas in Acts, the {illustration: sine wave oscillating between "L" and "R"} model explains. Q: Do only apostolic Xtians do this? So I am atypical? Other people aren't built this way? My writing is a combined 2-signal output. Then the "melting" of causal trains was the (my) external programming resynchronizing; I was running ahead of clock time B + stimuli: reacting in advance. Due to Thomas breaking through in 2-74; some of his time got added to mine. Could "Thomas" be female? How does his voice differ from the AI voice? It doesn't. Diana, whom I saw. Whom I love. Who saved me.

us. "The mind has the power to change its environment. We do so constantly," etc. I have choice in the matter. So I ask, not, "What is true?" but, "What modulations shall I imprint on the stuff around me?" That which is now most precious to me is Ho On taking the form of the spring queen Diana; she is my protectress; Valis has metamorphosed into her. I pre-programmed her, into being; but she is real; she actually exists. One could say, "this is irrational if I believe it + it doesn't happen." + if I believe it + it does happen? Then the universe is irrational; it should not be psychomorphic. But it is. This is the secret message of "TTBofTD," the hidden Gnosis of Tibet[ian Buddhism], the highest wisdom -+ power- man has ever known. In the flip flops of the dialectic [process] truth changes every nanosecond. (This oversimplifies it, but v. supra pp 6 on.) There is no "esse," only flux. You can plug into whichever sustain you wish; it's your option. Before reading "TTBofTD" I was tending toward a radical [Gnostic] acosmism; hence I [unconsciously; i.e. my will] correctly deconstructed "TTBofTD" as few others have. In "Ubik" I applied it to us, deliberately. Soon impossible things began to happen; I found myself in the silly putty metastasizing kind of universe I write about - + in 3-74 Ubik rescued me in a form ultra syntonic to me (which I have frequently realized but didn't fathom until last Friday). Also, I had digested Heraclitus + his theory

+ so are in the Bardo Thodol existence but do not realize it; time stopped at Acts when Shiva / the Holy Spirit took over from Christ/Vishnu. No new sparks have come into existence since then - just sterile pranes lacking souls (sparks of light). Shiva / the Paraclete sees to it that the true sparks (for whom he is herdsman) travel closer + closer to God (Valis/Ubik). (He is "Runciter".) Thus I saw him first as the Sibyl of Cumae + then in male form; for me he is herdsman; for the evil ones he is destroyer. He has already led me back to God, whom I now experience as Diana, the soul of my religion: a beautiful young woman with wild animals + carrying flowers: the springtime: Ho On. This is the macrocosmic version, but in microcosmic form it can be said that I personally as an individual spark in 2-3-74 entered the 3rd + final stage of my cycle, I passed over into the jurisdiction of Shiva or the Paraclete, who now guides me back home again to God (represented by Linda Ronstadt driving me in a car + singing). From my standpoint, either version in pragmatic terms suffices. Anyhow, the value of this Shiva third part of the cycle (inhalation) explains {...}

Complete

I finally remembered [Einsteins] early on insight last night: my [proctoric], + companion + help (3-74) is a gift from my sister, who I see in Laura. The source of it all - the AI voice - comes not as Jane but as a gift from her; hence my postportem experiences. This is why I feel whole upon being with Laura, the Spring Queen.

I am plugging into a giant idea computer - I am the next step up in evolution, which, because the next step up plugs into this giant idea computer, has a virtually infinite mind. My jungian intuitive possibilité, function: in my right hemisphere like a photon gun. I have two protection devices to conceal my identity: 1) scramble pattern of all ideas at once to bury my idea of my true nature + origin; ➀ + 2) amnesia we came to this planet from elsewhere.

The Soviets are modern Xtians with their supernatural powers - against them is pitted my [protagonist] Diana who used her magic to overwhelm external reality with ideas in 3-74 - which is hard (for her, for anyone) to do - to counter Xtian Technology. The Xtians are fanatic + zealous + authoritarian. "Faith of ..." is virtually literally correct. "Secret Xtian" equals Soviet sleeper agent.

➀ This is why all the ideas in the world - millions of them, + conflicting. Get served up simultaneously, as a protective smoke screen; this is why they don't stabalize. They have a practical purpose - as a cloud of Mental Ink. I'm not to know the trurh about my identity. So any + all ideas I get as to my identity, nature, purpose + origin is just scatter, random flak, each idea as real + unreal as the next; like white noise + the closer I get to knowing, the more scramble of conflicting ideas: ultimately an infinitude of them - inc. this idea. Hence the endless paradoxes, + the fact that I can't finalize or stabilize my exegesis - its' for my (+ our?) protection: a scramble device-like code.

When another language (which you didn't understand) was spoken, + some of the memories had to do with belonging to a covert political group which blew up buildings + used codes. + that you had another personality in your head with ideosyncracies + habits different from yours + who spoke a Foreign language. Isn't "Tears" a police state? + this other you had lived in that police state- despite what you remembered. What is most ominous is that this other personality was summooned to the surface specifically by the Xerox Missive, + took [math] control, answering ads + making phone calls, etc, somehow related to "Tears" + it has memories of a lake + a cabin, + a big house with a garden. The "AI-voice is this other personility thinking. + there was code in the Xerox Missive which it could read, but resisted recording. + you have a whole missing year just before writing "Tears."

----------

Previous insight: secret Xtians + OCCP are one. But Diana doesn't want us to suffer; she wants us to be happy. But this will rob us of our Godhood. Which is to be preferred: the OCCP / Secret Xtian "Tears" or Diana's Joy? It's a hard Q. to answer. The OCCP has all the Xtian technology. Diana saved me in 3-74 from the Secret Xtian / OCCP. I deserve to be happy; my sister asked Diana to aid me. Pastoral, simple, natural ephemoral happiness or permanent transmutation into heroic Godhood - which is better? Diana felt I'd suffered too much. Xtianity is a cruel religion but profound.

The set/ground discrimination (of 3-74): paradoxes in depth. Last night, suddenly, I realized what I had experienced, found myself in: it was a hologram! What I was experiencing was the world as it is: a 3-D halo "Cube"! I was picking up one of the two beam-sources in set + in color; the other in black + white + as ground. A projected world: Expressed another way, it only seems to be 3-D; its depth is illusion - which brings me back to my belief that we're stationary

The slain God proliferates down through the cosmos to each rat + cockroach.

----------

A God short circuited my suffering (karma) early through grace + granted me apotheosis 3-74, + then provided me with reward, Diana, so that for me the Arcadian Joy is not an alternative to successful immortality as part of the graphic of the hologram, but that which follows the catalyst, the transfiguration: by way of the rule of Ma'at I deserve it. I deduce that I deserve it because it was given to me; I do not infer it in contemplating my life: I am not the judge. It was not my decision to cut the tribulation short. But the tribulation was no longer necessary; the permanent self "Thomas" has successfully come into existence.

----------

Coleridge on tragedy: "...the greatest effect is produced when the fate is represented as a higher + intelligent will" ("the human will was exhibited as struggling with fate"). So the essence of tragedy is the limited human knowledge, plans, hopes, desires (will) clashing with "a higher + intelligent will "which we understand (or encounter) as Fate - "Fate" defined as that power or those powers capable of arranging our outcome.
